title: March 12th, 2022
body:
lyrics

i don’t care if you’re lying long as you’re tryin to speak truth

pushing rocks like this was the myth of sisyphus

workin to eating to sleeping
that’s service you need to keep even

i’ve got time to kill just not the will
put the gun to his face
cocked on that clock and watched
his hands frantically circle and
i just wanted to hold him
apologize for all those stolen moments
resolve dissolved but those hands kept racing
chasing eternity, turning...turning
i’m clocked in, clocking, clapping
while that infernal jockey keeps tick-tock mocking me
i’ve got a tic that won’t stop teasing release
just one squeeze...bust - ed
cuz the gun rusted. oxidized by tears of relief
relinquished control. soul succumbs to seconds
gluttonous helpings when i can’t even finish
my first serving of infinity
seconds make minutes
and minutes make hours
and hours make days
and days make years look big
at least from the instant i’m standing on
sure, the leper begs to differ
but beggars can’t be choosers
besides, since the beginning we’ve been living on borrowed time
tomorrow i’m scheduled for a three o’clock with destiny
but for now, i’ve got time to kill
and where there’s a way why waste time on will

there is no difference between a building
a picture of a building
and three frogs chilling on a lily pad
in the middle of a corn fielding
stupid questions about their feelings

how many different ways can i say i love you? i know at least two. and this one's been a longtime coming

i look fine in that drama
i'm a wear it all the time

look now i know why ya spittin like someone else
you were sittin by yourself asking
how i'm supposed to know i'm good at rappin
i been there befo it's a bad habit
snap out it


i like my music loud and my women proud
i like my music proud and my women loud

written by aaron saenz

[somewhere off in the distance]

[an enormous explosion sounds. this is the big bang. it rushes by our ears and we hear its ferocity. then, a reversal. the bang wooshes back past us and we hear its timidity. we end with an enormous inverse bang, a sucking sound]

anion: this sucks
cation: don’t be hard on yourself, you were dealt a luckless hand
anion: you say that. you say that
cation: i do. i also say that you should hit this and quit your yappin’. [inhale] ain’t nothing started, ain’t nothing happen. [exhale]
anion: damn. [inhale] it really is all gone, isn’t. [exhale]
cation: every last bit, ever was or will be. poof! puff! passed...on
anion: that’s a lot to lay on me, man
cation: don’t start again on that. wasn’t you. trust me. that was all luck herself, lady or not. [inhale] besides, no matter who did what, what’s gone now, so now all we have to care about is who. [exhale]. and who is me and you
anion: you’d be better off alone
cation: i am the best
anion:[chuckles] fuck. [inhale] stop trying to cheer my ass up.[exhale]
cation: deal
anion: deal
cation: alright, well, let’s start the next one up
anion: what? are you crazy? [inhale] seriously. what the shit kinda brain storm sewer fuckin’ muck is that? [exhale] how you going to make another one of...everything?
cation: i gotta magic word
anion: the shit you do
cation. the shit i do
anion: sweet. well no fuckin’ concern then. you got magic words that solves up most of our situation. fuckin’ lucky break for us. glad you on the team. well, serve ‘em up cook! what we got?
cation: it’s not time yet. dig ‘em honey smacks, we have to get organized first. [inhale] scheming and planning are our current raison d’etre. [exhale]
anion: this shit. you’re an erudite idiot at best. at best. i’m a 100% certified fuck-up of the nth degree. so together we’re exactly as fit for the world as a half aborted jesus-fetus on christmas
cation: [inhale][beat][exhale] ...and yet…
anion: and yet? seriously?
cation: seriously. so much yet, my yeti preppy buddy. it’s time for ideas, lots of ideas, we gotta figure out how this one’s gonna get laid out
anion: you want ideas? [inhale] alright [exhale] then let’s have a dream, man
cation: a proper dream?
anion: no other kind. let’s take a trip to dreamland, see what kind of shit we can dry and smoke
cation: [inhale] yeah, man. yeah. [exhale] why not. [beat] you ready?
anion: ready freddy rest in peace, i’m ready
cation: alright alright alright. first magic word...slumber
anion: [inhale] [exhale] slumber
cation: slumber

[the echoes of slumber blur slowly into the void]





plans for morenossance faire (noble's baby shower)

something you want to supply or assume responsibility for? use our patented color coding system.  amber genevieve jade mom laura

schedule:
1pm- begin setup
2:30pm- start putting the food out
3pm- guests arrive
5pm- gather whole group
announce winners for any games
 “yarn ceremony”
6pm- guests depart
7:30pm- ladies dinner and sleepover kick off

instructions for “games”:

gift table
materials: table, photo of amber and bill

advice from inner child to new parents
materials: pens, paper, mailbox (or smallish vessel)

[words](words) of encouragement for daddy bear to read to mommy bear while birthing
materials: pens, paper, envelope

daisy chain making (for whimsy and festive guest adornment)
materials: daisies, instructions, knife, bobby pins

garland making (to be displayed in nursery)
materials: fishing twine, pom poms, palm-sized charms, scissors, cardboard to store

birthing playlists (spotify will be open on my laptop for anyone to make a playlist on)
materials: amber's laptop set up in quiet corner by a plug

[canvas](canvas) for finger painting (to be displayed in nursery)
materials: 9x12 canvas, paints, drop cloth, tape to do resist before

face painting
materials: amber's face paint kit

fortune telling:
materials: possibly a couple costume pieces, r.h. style crystal ball, video camera

archery
materials: jade's archery set, rope & bunting for gallery, board to record scores

horseshoes
materials on property

swimming
materials on property

yarn ceremony
materials: yarn, scissors
we invite you to bless the family by naming what gifts you see amber and bill giving to their child. in what way will they shine as new parents...come up with a word or phrase. then as we throw the yarn around the circle...catch the ball, wrap it around your wrist, speak your blessing, and then throw the ball to someone across from you who hasn’t had it yet
.... let’s take a second to notice the ways our blessings connect us as a group to amber and bill. we are their community and our love and well wishes will support them as they become parents. [now](now) let's break off our pieces of yarn and tie them around our wrists. you can wear this string on your wrist as a reminder of the blessing you gave today, keep it on until baby is born or when you first meet the new tiny moreno

[shopping](shopping) [list](list):

food
cake
etc
etc

[art supplies](art supplies)
canvas
framed instructions, easels

decorations
paper flowers





duties: (thoughts?)
jade- decor, games, invitations (to be mailed june 15th, 2016)
mom- food
genevieve- group gatherings, organizing help, assist where needed
favors
poo pick up (set up)
